title: mesosorus glaucus
intro: Mesosorus glaucus, also known as the Blumea lacera or Blue Mallow, is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Mesosorus glaucus include relief from fever, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
